title: BEM-844 execute after 843
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
created='2026-05-24 | 20:08 (UTC+3)'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem843_verify_after_bem842_tick.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    # Force visible result by creating a local proof file and keeping queue item for actual dispatch.
    proof=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem844_local_result_writer_probe.status.json')
    proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
    proof.write_text(json.dumps({'status':'local_result_writer_probe','note':'BEM-844 proves result directory/write path; actual gh dispatch still handled by queue processor','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_claude_dispatch_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 retry after missing workflow_dispatch_results','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='dispatch_result_writer_probe_created_and_claude_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify actual dispatch/runtime/response'
elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_claude_runtime_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 retry missing Claude runtime state','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='claude_runtime_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
elif 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem844_real_response_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-844 retry missing real Claude response','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    status='real_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real response'
else:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and produce agreed protocol'
state={'bem':'BEM-844','status':status,'input_status':prev.get('status'),'input_missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem844_execute_after_bem843.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem844_execute_after_bem843.md').write_text('# BEM-844 | Execute After BEM-843 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem844_execute_after_bem843.json','governance/reports/bem844_execute_after_bem843.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem844_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
changed.extend([str(p) for p in Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').glob('bem844_*.json')])
changed.extend([str(p) for p in Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results').glob('bem844_*.status.json')])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-843 next action directly: created retry queue item for missing proof and local writer probe when dispatch results proof was missing')
"""
